items.title: Microsoft reports strong earnings as Azure hit by major outage
items.description: Tech giant reports earnings of $3.72 per share day after deal with OpenAI pushed value of company to more than $4tn

items.title: Dear Apple Stock Fans, Mark Your Calendars for October 30
items.description: Apple is set to report its fiscal Q4 earnings after the close on Wednesday.

items.title: Sam Altman's OpenAI Targets Up To $1 Trillion Valuation In Historic IPO After Major Restructuring And California Approval: Report
items.description: OpenAI is reportedly preparing for a potential IPO that could value the ChatGPT maker at up to $1 trillion as early as 2026–2027, following a major restructuring, regulatory approval in California, and renewed confidence from key investor Microsoft.

items.title: Microsoft, Alphabet and Meta results overshadowed by growing fears of AI bubble
items.description: Microsoft revealed that its spending on AI infrastructure hit almost $35bn (£26.5bn) in the three months to the end of September, a sharp rise compared with the year before.  Alphabet has also set out aggressive spending ambitions, but placated investors thanks to an impressive set of results that surpassed analysts' expectations.

items.title: Microsoft Is Dramatically Boosting AI Investments as It Races to Keep Up With Demand
items.description: Microsoft reported a massive spike in its spending as the tech giant works to meet booming demand for artificial intelligence.
